meta.title: Gestion ORÉA | Real Estate Holding
meta.description: Gestion ORÉA — real estate holding company specializing in property acquisition, management and value creation.

hero.title: We buy
hero.institutional: Every asset is acquired to be held, repositioned and operated over the long term. Zero buildings resold since 2020.
hero.subtitle: Disciplined execution. Long-term vision.

operations.title: In-house management
operations.desc: We operate ourselves. Every building, every day.

strategy.title: Buy to hold
strategy.desc: Reposition to create value. Hold to preserve it.

founder.text: Founded by Olivier Lemieux. Over ten years in construction. 450+ units acquired and repositioned since 2020.

broker.title: Have a building to sell?
broker.text: We actively buy multi-residential buildings in our target markets. Fast analysis. Response within 48 hours.

presentation.title: Our vision
presentation.text: Become a benchmark in multi-residential real estate in Quebec, built on rigorous execution, strong in-house management and durable value creation.
presentation.text2: Since 2020, ORÉA has been building a portfolio focused on Greater Montreal and Estrie. Bigger buildings. A stronger team. A long-term vision — to leave behind a higher-quality housing stock.

audience.title: Working with ORÉA
audience.intro: We work with lenders and partners who share our approach: discipline, long term, execution.

lenders.text: We engage with lenders active in multi-residential for acquisition financing, repositioning and refinancing.

meta.title: Gestion ORÉA | About
meta.description: Discover the history, mission and values of Gestion ORÉA, your real estate management partner.

header.title: About ORÉA
header.subtitle: ORÉA is a real estate holding company specializing in the acquisition, management and enhancement of multi-residential assets in Quebec.
header.positioning: Built in Estrie since 2020, ORÉA now focuses its growth on Greater Montreal.

ecosystem.title: Supporting ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: ORÉA relies on an ecosystem of complementary businesses that support certain operations, management and development functions.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Acquire underperforming buildings, reposition them with discipline and operate them according to lasting standards of management, maintenance and rental quality.
mission.text2: Through rigorous management, targeted renovations and disciplined execution, ORÉA repositions multi-residential buildings into quality living environments — better operated, better maintained and better suited to tenant expectations. Every project contributes to the lasting improvement of Quebec's housing stock.

rigor.title: Operational rigor
rigor.description: Each asset is managed with operational discipline grounded in process, follow-through and quality of execution.

longterm.title: Long-term vision
longterm.description: We invest with a long-term horizon, with a view to durable ownership and progressive value creation.

local.title: Local roots
local.description: We focus our efforts on markets we know in depth, with a disciplined, ground-level local understanding.

quality.title: Asset quality
quality.description: We believe that a well-maintained, well-operated and well-repositioned asset protects its value and improves its performance over time.

media.title: Podcasts
media.subtitle: Olivier Lemieux shares his vision of multi-residential real estate.

team.title: The founder
team.bio1: Olivier Lemieux has worked in the construction environment for more than ten years. In 2020, he undertook his first multi-residential real estate project, which he acquired, renovated and operated directly. That initial project marked the starting point of the path that would lead to the creation and development of ORÉA. Since then, the company has built an in-house execution capability focused on the repositioning and disciplined operation of residential assets in its target markets.
team.bio2: His path has been shaped in a demanding market environment marked by rising interest rates, cost pressure and tighter credit conditions. That reality has informed an approach grounded in adaptation, rigor and durability.
team.bio3: Building after building, ORÉA has strengthened its internal management structure and on-the-ground execution capacity, with a disciplined, long-term growth vision.
team.bio4: Father of three daughters, Olivier leads ORÉA with the conviction that only solid foundations stand the test of time.
